name: Tokyo revengers- Tokyo manji gang
description: The characters of the gang toman, or known as Tokyo manji gang, from the show Tokyo Revengers, a show about gangs, friends, betrayal, action, and drama. Along with alot of fighting and yelling, the characters, Mikey, mitsuya, Drake, smiley, smileys brother, then there's kazutora, takemitchi, baji, pah-chin, ran and rindou haitani, and kokonoi.
